<h1 align=center> Hipparcos/Tycho Catalogue Data</h1>
<H3 align=center>Hipparcos Catalogue Intermediate Data<br> HIP 1349 </H3><p>For information on field definitions see <A href="https://hipparcos-tools.cosmos.esa.int/pstex/sect2_08.pdf"> 
Guide to Hipparcos Intermediate Data fields (pdf)</A>
<pre align=left>
<b>Field       Value                 Field Description </b>
IH1   :     1349             Hipparcos Catalogue (HIP) identifier 
IH2   :        7.01          Provisional Hp magnitude used for the merging (mag)
IH3   :        4.22329974    Right ascension alpha (deg)
IH4   :      -52.65159230    Declination delta (deg)
IH5   :       43.45          Trigonometric parallax pi (mas)
IH6   :      314.94          Proper motion in right ascension mu_alpha* (mas/year)
IH7   :      182.50          Proper motion in declination mu_delta (mas/year)
IH8   : O                    Code for adopted solution (5, 7, 9, C, O, V, X, -)
IH9   :       91             Number of following abscissae records, N_A
